linkedin.notes: Primary — CRE brokers and business owners with transaction needs both active on LinkedIn

facebook.notes: CRE professional groups and business investment communities

hubspot.notes: Set portal_id and sequence_id per client. Two sequences: one for cre_broker, one for transaction_prospect

calendly.notes: Discovery call CTAs in approved messages
